title: Rustark 121Pcs Seam Rippers Set Thread Remover Tools Includes 8Pcs Sewing Seam Rippers, 10Pcs Tailors Chalks, 100Pcs Sewing Pins and 2Pcs U Shape Scissors for DIY Sewing Dressmaking Embroidery
features: 【 GREAT VALUE KIT 】 ----- The seam ripper set includes 4pcs small seam rippers, 4pcs big seam rippers, 100pcs sewing pins, 10pcs tailors chalks, 2pcs u-shaped scissors and 1pc black storage bag, total 121 pieces. With our complete seam rippers stitch remover tools, you'll have everything you need for improving your sewing projects.

【 3 SIZES SEAM RIPPERS 】------ Made of high-quality metal and plastic, the seam rippers are sharp, sturdy and not easy to rust. With a red round mini ball at the end of the fork, the seam rippers are easy to complete the seam, thread and stitch removal work, protecting your fabric from damage at the same time. There are 3 sizes of seam rippers available in this set, suitable for many different types of fabrics.

【 ERGONOMIC & SAFETY DESIGN 】 ----- The seam ripper is designed with an ergonomic non-slip handle for maximum grip comfort, making it lighter and easier to operate. You can feel comfortable even during prolonged use. Besides, seam ripper comes with a transparent end cap to protect the sharp blade when not in use, so you can safely carry it outdoors or store it at home with a peace of mind.

【 USEFUL EXTRA TOOLS 】 ----- This sewing stitch remover tool kit includes necessary tools for your sewing needs to change or repair stitches, including sewing pins, tailors chalks, scissors, and storage bag, saving your time and money to buy them separetely. It’s a great helper for you to finish your stitches removing, hand sewing or embroidery DIY projects.

【 WIDE APPLICATIONS 】 --- The Seam Ripper Set is widely used for a variety of sewing, arts and crafts projects, such as remove, change or repair stitches without damaging the fabric, use them for homemade dresses, blouses, blankets, shirt, T-shirt, jeans, pants, bags and more. This colorful tools set will make your sewing experience more joyful and fun.
